'''dhagosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalework|scalework]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalework|scalework]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhagosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhægesheth|dhægesheth]] || [[word:dhægeshej|dhægeshej]] || [[word:dhægeshesh|dhægeshesh]] || [[word:dhægeshe|dhægeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhagogoshoth|dhagogoshoth]] || [[word:dhagogoshoj|dhagogoshoj]] || [[word:dhagogoshosh|dhagogoshosh]] || [[word:dhagogosho|dhagogosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhagoshoth|dhagoshoth]] || [[word:dhagoshoj|dhagoshoj]] || [[word:dhagoshosh|dhagoshosh]] || [[word:dhagosho|dhagosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhagofshoth|dhagofshoth]] || [[word:dhagofshoj|dhagofshoj]] || [[word:dhagofshosh|dhagofshosh]] || [[word:dhagofshof|dhagofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhagoshotho|dhagoshotho]] || [[word:dhagoshojo|dhagoshojo]] || [[word:dhagoshosho|dhagoshosho]] || [[word:dhagoshoko|dhagoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhagoshoth|dhagoshoth]] || [[word:dhagoshoj|dhagoshoj]] || [[word:dhagoshosh|dhagoshosh]] || [[word:dhagosho|dhagosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhagoshothol|dhagoshothol]] || [[word:dhagoshojol|dhagoshojol]] || [[word:dhagoshoshol|dhagoshoshol]] || [[word:dhagoshokol|dhagoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhagoshothotho|dhagoshothotho]] || [[word:dhagoshojojo|dhagoshojojo]] || [[word:dhagoshoshosho|dhagoshoshosho]] || [[word:dhagoshoko|dhagoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhagoshothon|dhagoshothon]] || [[word:dhagoshojon|dhagoshojon]] || [[word:dhagoshoshon|dhagoshoshon]] || [[word:dhagoshokon|dhagoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhagoshothoro|dhagoshothoro]] || [[word:dhagoshojoro|dhagoshojoro]] || [[word:dhagoshoshoro|dhagoshoshoro]] || [[word:dhagoshokoro|dhagoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
